---
title: "Dajedaje"
author: pino
affiliation: Sapienza
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: ao   
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 200px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 400px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    theme: superhero
    self-contained: true  
---
# Presentation

Daje, dajino, dajone

All'improvviso, Capena
![Capena](Dajino/img-2.jpg)
[Link to something] <https://iris.unive.it/handle/10278/3679958>

## Mini dajino
Poffarbacco $$X = V + E$$

### Micro dajino

#### Nano dajino
